alignments.json_text: This is a record store, bro. We don't do that no more.
alignments.wiki_text: This is a record store, bro. We don't do that no mo'.
alignments.proposed_text: This is a record store, bro. We don't do that no mo'.

alignments.json_text: Well, how much you charge, man? I just, I just want to trim. You're like a taper.
alignments.wiki_text: Well, how much do you charge, man? I just... it's... I just want a trim, y'know, like a taper.
alignments.proposed_text: Well, how much do you charge, man? I just... it's... I just want a trim, y'know, like a taper.

alignments.json_text: Bruh, we don't do that no more.
alignments.wiki_text: Bruh... we don't do that no more.
alignments.proposed_text: Bruh, we don't do that no more.

alignments.json_text: Look, check it out. You're in beauty, man. That's what it says. And you're in my neighborhood.
alignments.wiki_text: Look, check it out. You're in beauty, man. That's what it says... and you're in my neighborhood, I live two--
alignments.proposed_text: Look, check it out. You're in beauty, man. That's what it says... and you're in my neighborhood, I live two--

alignments.json_text: I live eight blocks from, I can walk down there.
alignments.wiki_text: I live eight blocks from there, I can walk down there.
alignments.proposed_text: I live eight blocks from there, I can walk down there.

alignments.json_text: Okay, come on through and see what we got.
alignments.wiki_text: Okay, come on through and see what we got.
alignments.proposed_text: Okay, come on through and see what we got.

alignments.json_text: How much you charge for a haircut?
alignments.wiki_text: What do you... how much you charge for a haircut?
alignments.proposed_text: What do you... how much you charge for a haircut?

alignments.json_text: I don't know. I'll come down there. What, you don't think I'm going to come down?

alignments.proposed_text: I don't know, I... I'll come down there!

alignments.json_text: I don't know. I'll come down there. What, you don't think I'm going to come down?

alignments.proposed_text: What, you don't think I'm gonna come down?

alignments.json_text: Why don't you come down here, cut my freaking hair?
